text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Since we've finished training, can I take
you somewhere nice?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you know! The nighttime scenery there is
awesome and twinkly—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! ...Oh, Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hi, Teio! What's up?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've been looking for you! I told you to let me
know if you were going to be home late!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! ☆ Well, I'm gonna be home late! Sorry,
Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right. I've been itching to run ever since I saw
Prez's race earlier.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
To put it in your words... You could say she was
twinkly.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I totally get it! She's super cool when she
runs, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmm, now I'm feeling a little excited myself...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's forget that nighttime scenery! I
wanna twinkle!
choice_data_list: Resting is just as important as training.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehe! That's my trainer for ya!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do some pair running! That should
be exciting too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay! Time for takeoff! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mayano Top Gun dives headfirst into
her additional training.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm, true that! I need a little rest if I want my skin
to look twinkly!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'll steal some of the nighttime twinkle for
myself!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll be off then!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Be back by curfew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun and I get some good rest in
while enjoying the nighttime scenery.
